hooks.text: Three business owners sent the exact same fifty thousand dollar wire to the exact same supplier. Their supplier received three different amounts.
Same fifty thousand dollars. Same supplier. Same day. Three business owners, three different amounts landed. The reason is hiding on the wire receipt.
Three business owners wired fifty thousand dollars to one supplier. It arrived as forty nine thousand two fifty, forty nine seven hundred, and forty nine eight fifty.
A business owner sent fifty thousand dollars. So did two others, same supplier, same day. One supplier got six hundred dollars less than another. Nobody told them why.
Two business owners sent the same wire you just sent. One quietly lost six hundred dollars to their bank's rate. You won't see which one is you.
